example_tasks: Sync Garmin workout data to Strava
Export sleep tracking metrics from Oura ring
Configure heart rate alerts on smartwatch
Transfer daily step counts to spreadsheet
Set up custom vibration patterns on smart band
reasoning: The icon clearly depicts a smartwatch or wearable device with a right-pointing arrow inside. This makes it highly suitable for tasks involving wearable technology, syncing fitness or health data, smart notifications, or watchOS/WearOS development. It is too specific for general time management but excellent for device-specific workflows.
